query: SELECT fieldName, targetLanguage, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN translatedText LIKE '```%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as corrupted FROM translations WHERE fieldName IN ('keyFeatures', 'itineraryDetailed', 'costExplanation', 'noticeDetailed') GROUP BY fieldName, targetLanguage ORDER BY fieldName, targetLanguage;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4TdGiyGWHynzTjR.2f22c070361b --database D3XjbQ67JpFf2y4FWefWHw --execute SELECT fieldName, targetLanguage, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN translatedText LIKE '```%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as corrupted FROM translations WHERE fieldName IN ('keyFeatures', 'itineraryDetailed', 'costExplanation', 'noticeDetailed') GROUP BY fieldName, targetLanguage ORDER BY fieldName, targetLanguage;
